name: caresync-backend
description: Backend API for CareSync health tracker

scripts.start: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "node index.js" "node services/authService.js" "node services/userService.js" "node services/medicineService.js" "node services/symptomService.js" "node services/telemedicineService.js" "node services/labTestService.js"
scripts.dev: concurrently --kill-others-on-fail "nodemon index.js" "nodemon services/authService.js" "nodemon services/userService.js" "nodemon services/medicineService.js" "nodemon services/symptomService.js" "nodemon services/telemedicineService.js" "nodemon services/labTestService.js"
